JOINTLY OPTIMIZE CHARACTERISTICS OF ANALOG FILTER DESIGNS Brian L. Evans, Douglas R. Firth, Kennard D. White and Edward A. Lee Proceedings of the European Conference on Circuit Theory and Design, pp.1047-1050 Istanbul, Turkey, August 27-31, 1995 Pre

1047-1050 Istanbul, Turkey, August 27-31, 1995 Prepublished version Published version ABSTRACT This paper gives an algebraic frame work for designing analog filters that are jointly optimized for magnitude, phase, and step responses, and lter qualit

itude, phase, and step responses, and lter quality. We formulate the design problem as a sequential quadratic programming (SQP) problem and use symbolic mathematical software to translate the SQP formulation into working MATLAB programs to optimize
mulation into working MATLAB programs to optimize analog filters.
